23.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

23.gl: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
23.kj: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.
23.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;

23.gl: properly, eaten, i.e. food; also flesh, i.e. body
23.dv: or לָחֻם; passive participle of H3898 (לָחַם);

24.gl: properly, to slide by, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, pass on, spring up, pierce or change
24.kj: abolish, alter, change, cut off, go on forward, grow up, be over, pass (away, on, through), renew, sprout, strike through.

24.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris
24.dv: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending;

24.gl: military equipment, i.e. (collectively) arms (offensive or defensive), or (concretely) an arsenal
24.kj: armed men, armour(-y), battle, harness, weapon.

24.gl: to bolt, i.e. figuratively, to flee suddenly
24.kj: chase (away); drive away, fain, flee (away), put to flight, make haste, reach, run away, shoot.

24.gl: iron (as cutting); by extension, an iron implement
24.dv: perhaps from the root of H1269 (בִּרְזוֹת);

25.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
25.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

25.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
25.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
25.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

25.gl: properly, bitterness; concretely, a bitter thing; specifically bile; also venom (of a serpent)
fright; concrete, an idol (as a bugbear)
25.kj: dread, fear, horror, idol, terrible, terror.
25.dv: or (shortened) אֵמָה; from the same as H366 (אָיֹם);

25.gl: lightning; by analogy, a gleam; concretely, a flashing sword
to pull out, up or off

26.gl: to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk
26.kj: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place).
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

26.gl: to puff, in various applications (literally, to inflate, blow hard, scatter, kindle, expire; figuratively, to disesteem)
26.kj: blow, breath, give up, cause to lose (life), seething, snuff.

26.gl: properly, to be broken up (with any violent action) i.e. (figuratively) to fear
26.kj: be grevious (only Isaiah 15:4; the rest belong to H7489 (רָעַע)).

26.gl: the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness
a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)

27.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)

27.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
27.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

27.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
27.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
27.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

27.kj: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
27.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

28.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
28.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
28.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

28.kj: [phrase] advertise, appear, bewray, bring, (carry, lead, go) captive (into captivity), depart, disclose, discover, exile, be gone, open, [idiom] plainly, publish, remove, reveal, [

28.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)

28.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
28.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

28.gl: to flow; figuratively, to stretch out; causatively, to pour out or down; figuratively, to deliver over
28.kj: fall, flow away, pour down (out), run, shed, spilt, trickle down.

28.gl: produce, i.e. a crop or (figuratively) wealth

29.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
29.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

29.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
29.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

29.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
29.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

29.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
29.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

29.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
29.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

29.gl: properly, smoothness (of the tongue); also an allotment
